title: LifeSteal
description: Kill a player to gain a heart or die and lose one!
body:
# LifeSteal ## HOW IT WORKS - You gain a Heart by killing a player - You lose a Heart by dying - You can withdraw Hearts with /withdraw (amount) - You get eliminated when reaching 0 Hearts - Players can be revived with the Revive Beacon ### Disclaimer This mod does not aim to impersonate/copy the LifeSteal SMP. This mod aims to replicate (and hopefully perfectionate) the many mods that recreate the LifeSteal SMP experience for everyone to enjoy.
LifeSteal SMP also has seasonal updates that change the gameplay style for creating better content on Youtube, but this mod will keep only the features present in the description above. Hope you enjoy!
Report any bugs/unwanted features in my Discord server.
